meaning: n.杓子,长柄杓vt.以杓舀取,(用杓)舀汤,不分对象予以赠送
examples: Lunch is a ladle of chili with rice, cornbread, salad, and a slab of chocolate cake.
Ladle out the compliments.Did Tom fix the office photocopier - again?
Ladle the sauce on top, top with pork and chopped peanuts, and serve while hot.
Bill Bobbitt, a county inspector, dips a ladle into the water and brings up half a dozen wriggling larvae.
Ladle some tomato sauce over this and continue layering, finishing with one of tomato sauce and a sprinkling of cheeses.
